title: Iris Mack
compiled_truth: Iris Mack is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2001-03-05 to 2001-12-05), Iris Mack sent 61 and received 190 emails, totalling 251 interactions. Top correspondents: [Vince Kaminski](people/vince-kaminski) (40), [Amitava Dhar](people/amitava-dhar) (24), [Vasant Shanbhogue](people/vasant-shanbhogue) (23), [Mike Mumford](people/mike-mumford) (16), [Ben Parsons](people/ben-parsons) (14). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, c, credit, deleted_items, enron_power, inbox.
